summary: Iteration 152 - Comprehensive testing of bug fixes for data rendering, font sizes, and UI cleanup. All features tested and verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing case data (Homann v R)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes from iteration 152 have been verified. Key features tested: LegalFrameworkViewer (forms/sections handle mixed data types), EvidenceSummary (garbage filtering), CaseDetail buildPrintAllHtml (ground_type formatting, law_sections, evidence, font sizes), BarristerView (single badge, offence capitalization), CaseStrengthMeter (heading size text-xl/2xl), exportHtml.js (font sizes 12px body, 20px h1, 14px h2, blue note cards), NotesSection (blue theme #2563eb). All disclaimers use bright red bg with white bold text.

features_verified.LegalFrameworkViewer_forms: PASS - handles both string and object forms (lines 480-498)
features_verified.LegalFrameworkViewer_legislation_section: PASS - handles both string and object sections (line 241)
features_verified.LegalFrameworkViewer_time_limits: PASS - keys show without underscores using textTransform:capitalize and replace(/_/g, ' ') (line 468)
features_verified.EvidenceSummary_garbage_filter: PASS - extractText function filters garbage strings (lines 6-21)
features_verified.buildPrintAllHtml_ground_type: PASS - shows with spaces and capitalized using replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase()) (line 799)
features_verified.buildPrintAllHtml_law_sections: PASS - handles both JSON strings and objects
features_verified.BarristerView_duplicate_badge: PASS - only ONE BARRISTER BRIEF badge (line 563)
features_verified.Disclaimers_styling: PASS - bright red bg (#dc2626), white bold text, yellow hazard icon (lines 55-58 in exportHtml.js)
